content: @Wedson Almeida Filho do you know where to find more info on receiver_trait. Google is not very helpful. Is this something that is ever going to be stable?

That one (and dispatch_from_dyn too) are indeed internal to the compiler. As far as I have been told, for dispatch_from_dyn there are no known issues, thus could be a candidate for giving it a tracking issue at some point; however, for receiver_trait, apparently arbitrary_self_types is "more general" and possibly the way forward. As for details, either asking our in-house Rust experts, or digging into rustc source code and Git commit history, Rust Zulip, etc. I guess :)
Andreas Hindborg has marked this topic as resolved.
